# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and allocation-free hot paths** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 upgrades to Skia m151 and delivers allocation-free HarfBuzz and SKShaper hot paths. The Skia engine moves to milestone m151 with multiple rounds of upstream bug fixes. Several high-frequency HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper code paths are reworked to eliminate per-call heap allocations, reducing GC pressure in tight render loops. WASM gains Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11, and a CPU raster regression is corrected.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia upgraded to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine is now built from chrome/m151, followed by three additional rounds of upstream bug-fix syncs, pulling in stability and correctness improvements from the Skia team. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing accepts ReadOnlySpan<char>** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char> in addition to string, eliminating substring allocations when parsing colours from slices or stack-allocated buffers. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))

## Bug Fixes

- **CPU raster regression corrected** — An upstream change removed SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT, silently switching the CPU raster pipeline to a slower path with incorrect output in some cases. The flag has been restored, recovering both correctness and performance on the CPU raster backend. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))
- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A code path in SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native reference when a subset image could not be created. The handle is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **Unnecessary unsafe modifier removed from GRContextOptions** — GRContextOptions no longer declares an unsafe context where none was needed, reducing compiler noise in projects that treat unsafe as a warning. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper hot paths made allocation-free** — HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder instead of allocating a byte array per call. HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse eliminate a per-call char[4] allocation. SKShaper reads glyph results via zero-copy spans instead of copying into intermediate arrays. Together these changes cut GC pressure significantly in text-heavy render loops. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))

## Platform

- **WASM gains Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11** — SkiaSharp now ships Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries targeting .NET 11 WASM, and the Skia submodule is updated to drop a redefined SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM macro that broke WASM builds. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459), [#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 ships with this release. The WASM libraries are refreshed for Emscripten 5.0.6 and .NET 11, and two high-frequency Tag.Parse and Buffer.AddUtf8 code paths are made allocation-free.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 support for .NET 11 and the Skia submodule fix that eliminated the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered the allocation-free HarfBuzz and SKShaper hot paths, the SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads, the CPU raster regression fix, the native resource leak fix in SKImage, and the WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 support.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 milestone upgrade and the initial WASM submodule fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
